objective: Complete HCM-1.2 as the additive instance-profile, artifact-instance descriptor, shipped-default metadata, typed producer, selection, and layering boundary; prove it, obtain a fresh clean review, and stop before HCM-1.3.

sections: HCM-1.2 — Instance profiles and artifact descriptors
Task 18: Full proof, review, promotion, and closeout

work_completed: Added the closed HCM-1.2 instance-profile schema and six bounded artifact content schemas.
Added typed artifact-instance descriptors, selected and unselected kind metadata, project-condition ownership, vocabulary and Context Resolution metadata producers.
Packaged the exact HCM-0.6 shipped root profile with six kinds and three root artifact instances, without Work, Decision, or Risk root instances.
Added request admission, exact source selection, root-to-leaf replace-whole layering, dependency closure, and deterministic resolved-profile fingerprints.
Proved exact 29-member definition tree, manifest, and crate byte equality with unchanged dependency manifests.
Remediated all fifty Required findings across Reviews 1 through 24; fresh Review 25 returned CLEAN.
Committed the immutable reviewed HCM-1.2 subject as git:832716a66241bdcf86e2a82ffb3ae72680a7c2cd.
Kept every downstream product-adoption gate open and did not start HCM-1.3.
